dep_checker/checker.py — 2 runtime prints converted to logging.info (L64 Scanning APT, L72 Scanning PIP). Trinity Signature block untouched. __main__ block print (L100 json.dumps) untouched — main_block_print_rule. import logging added.
trinity_dlp/DLP_Module.py L78 — audited. logging.critical + print() in send_alert() — dual_output_security_rule confirmed. Left intact.

J.A.R.V.I.S. — 9-invocation Easter egg wired. _increment_invocation() and _check_armed() added to jarvis_module.py. invoke_count and armed fields added to jarvis_config.json default dict. Counter hook in chat_engine.py dispatch — any jarvis trigger increments. 9th invocation fires Infiltrator Protocol modal. Confirmed working.
J.A.R.V.I.S. — jarvis_arm() added. 'jarvis arm full' sets armed: True in jarvis_config.json. Pipeline unlocked message returned.
J.A.R.V.I.S. — jarvis_pipeline() added. Gated behind _check_armed(). subfinder → httpx → nuclei → anomaly log write pipeline. Graceful degradation if tools not installed — shows install instructions.

J.A.R.V.I.S. — jarvis_model() added. 'jarvis model <name>' sets dedicated model in jarvis_config.json. 'jarvis model reset' clears it, falls back to primary. 'jarvis model' with no args shows current config.

J.A.R.V.I.S. — model hardcode fixed. 'mistral' fallback replaced with 'minimax-m2.7:cloud'. JARVIS_MODEL_PREFERENCE cleaned — removed hardcoded mistral. Priority: whiterabbitneo (Easter egg) → codellama → deepseek-coder → primary model from settings.json.

J.A.R.V.I.S. — invocation counter import fix. chat_engine.py was using bare 'from modules.jarvis...' import which failed silently inside Ethica's sys.path. Fixed to importlib.import_module() — now resolves correctly. Counter confirmed ticking inside Ethica.
J.A.R.V.I.S. — arm + pipeline + model triggers added to MODULE_TRIGGERS in chat_engine.py. Hidden from manifest — Easter egg tools invisible until armed.
jarvis_config.json — invoke_count reset to 0 before handoff. Armed: false.

wormhunter_false_positive_registry.init_reexport_rule: __init__.py relative imports are re-exports — never flag UNUSED.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.worker_print_rule: _worker.py print() calls are stdout JSON comms to parent subprocess — never convert.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.string_literal_print: print() inside multiline string literals or subprocess command strings — regex scanner limitation.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.nested_global_assignment: global X declared in outer function flagged unused when assignment is in nested inner function — suppressed at root in 063.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.test_file_imports: test_*.py files — pytest and unittest.mock imports always valid. Full file exemption.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.fragment_files: Files designed to be appended into parent scope — # WORM:SKIP sentinel on line 1.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.dual_output_security: logging.critical + print() in security alert handlers is intentional — both channels required.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.dep_checker_ceremonial: dep_checker Trinity Signature prints are ceremonial identity output — never convert.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.whitrabbitneo_legacy: WhiteRabbitNeo/ files are legacy pre-Ethica code — not wired into runtime. All findings are noise.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.lazy_load_duplicate: Same import in multiple function-scoped try: blocks — lazy load pattern. NOT a duplicate.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.reserved_imports: Imports marked with '# reserved' or '# noqa' are intentional placeholders.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.trinity_signature_ceremonial: debugtron_ai.py prints (✅ ❌ 🌌) are Trinity Signature verification output — never convert.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.main_block_cli: print() inside if __name__ == '__main__' blocks is intentional CLI/startup output — never convert.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.expression_only_fstring: f"# {'=' * 58}" style f-strings use expression-only placeholders — valid Python.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.intentional_scaffold_high_risk: chat_engine.py L415 _high_risk — intentional escalation scaffold. Never remove.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.intentional_scaffold_trim_history: chat_engine.py trim_history() system variable — inert dead method. Never remove.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.intentional_rollback_guard: module_forge.py L113 original — intentional rollback guard placeholder. Never remove.

critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — git -C ~/Ethica for all git ops
critical_debug_context.unicode_patch_rule: Files with box-drawing chars — use line-index insertion, not string match
critical_debug_context.tkinter_thread_rule: Never call Tkinter from daemon thread — use queue.Queue + root.after() drain pattern
critical_debug_context.option_b_rule: V runs all commands, pastes output — non-negotiable.
critical_debug_context.repr_first_rule: When string match fails — always repr() before retrying.
critical_debug_context.heredoc_escape_rule: Never use \n in heredoc strings — use chr(10) concatenation instead.
critical_debug_context.init_reexport_rule: Never remove imports from __init__.py without verifying re-export status.
critical_debug_context.dlp_bridge_path_rule: dlp_bridge.py lives at modules/trinity_dlp/dlp_bridge.py — NOT modules/dlp/
critical_debug_context.wormbot_autofix_rule: WormBot AUTO_FIX is ALL FALSE. Never re-enable without V explicit approval.
critical_debug_context.chmod_first_rule: Always chmod u+w <file> before patching vault-sealed files.
critical_debug_context.script_over_heredoc_rule: Complex multi-line patches — write to /tmp/patch_xxx.py and run with python3.
critical_debug_context.cap_net_raw_rule: setcap requires real binary not symlink. Always readlink -f first.
critical_debug_context.dual_output_security_rule: logging.critical + print() in security alert handlers — do not convert.
critical_debug_context.reserved_import_rule: Add '# reserved' or '# noqa' to intentional future pipeline imports.
critical_debug_context.trinity_signature_rule: Never convert print() inside Trinity Signature verification blocks.
critical_debug_context.main_block_print_rule: Never convert print() inside if __name__ == '__main__' blocks.
critical_debug_context.importlib_rule: Inside Ethica use importlib.import_module() not bare 'from modules...' imports in chat_engine hooks — sys.path may not resolve bare imports.

lesson_learned_065: importlib.import_module() is required for dynamic imports inside chat_engine.py hooks — bare 'from modules.x import y' fails silently inside Ethica's runtime sys.path. Always use importlib for hook-level imports. Also: heredoc_escape_rule bit us again on chr(10) — when in doubt write to /tmp/patch_xxx.py.
philosophy: Session 065 — Four commits. The dep_checker is clean. J.A.R.V.I.S. watches in silence until the ninth knock. Then he speaks. The Easter egg fired perfectly — modal first, status after, exactly as designed. The Infiltrator is watching. ⟁Σ∿∞
